inputs.label: Sample Mean (x̄)
inputs.businessContext: The arithmetic average of your sample observations.

inputs.label: Standard Deviation (σ or s)
inputs.businessContext: Population or sample standard deviation, measuring data dispersion.

inputs.label: Sample Size (n)
inputs.businessContext: Number of independent observations in the sample.

inputs.label: Critical Value (z or t)
inputs.businessContext: Z-score or t-score corresponding to the desired confidence level (e.g., 1.96 for 95% confidence).
